content:
There are too many accepted clashes with the same / similar idea. Please choose another one or modify your clash to be sufficiently unique.

For reference, here are some clashes with the exact same requirements:
- https://www.codingame.com/contribute/view/1214883428c9f7e967aa1a55ab7afa9205479d
- https://www.codingame.com/contribute/view/87862ff2ba5aa8fb90cc49e6f984fdfc19a81

Here are some clashes which are quite similar, but that have some slight differences with yours:
- https://www.codingame.com/contribute/view/41760ed90c5e54c9ad6ab90fcd70c86677e6b
- https://www.codingame.com/contribute/view/75321b6ffdc85b1f91b49309f655785feb984
- https://www.codingame.com/contribute/view/1068366ed159d48a79b5161c305c6f48998454

Thank you!

A clash with the same task exists:
https://www.codingame.com/contribute/view/1214883428c9f7e967aa1a55ab7afa9205479d

Please use another idea for your contribution.

Thanks.
